executive_summary: Iteration 000029 is fully compliant with the PRD. All 14 functional requirements are implemented and verified. All 6 user stories satisfy their acceptance criteria. The full test suite passes with 1455 tests and 0 failures, including all 81 new phase-6 tests.
minor_observations: FR-1/FR-2: AudioCrop and AudioSeparation nodes do not exist in vendored ComfyUI; direct torch implementations are architecturally correct per project convention.
FR-4/FR-5/FR-6/FR-8: KJNodes logic mirrored directly, avoiding unvendored external dependency.
FR-13: Example script adds PYCOMFY_MODELS_DIR env-var fallback and per-model filename overrides beyond minimum spec.
Pre-existing: 2 DeprecationWarnings in test_pipelines_ltx2_pose.py unrelated to this iteration.
conclusions_and_recommendations: Prototype is production-ready. Merge feature/it-000029 to main via PR. No refactor required.
refactor_plan: No refactor required. Optional follow-up: if vendored ComfyUI is updated, check for AudioCrop/AudioSeparation node availability (FR-1/FR-2). If KJNodes is ever vendored, consider delegating FR-4/FR-5/FR-6/FR-8 to actual nodes.
